2306.name: Inside the Gates
2306.description: The tall alpine gates that protect the interior of the plateau rise up on either side of you.. The air here is crisp and cold, the scent of pine and snow permeating everything. Ahead of you, the towering cliff face dominates the skyline, and you can feel the weight of the mountains bearing down on you. The settlement beyond is modest, built primarily from hand-cut alpine wood and sturdy granite from the mountain's heart. The pathways winding between the low houses seem well-worn and well-traveled.

npcs.name: Shaman guard
npcs.description: ready to act at any moment, weapon close at hand.

npcs.name: Skarag gatherer
npcs.description: Her strong hands and agile fingers are a testament to her expertise in collecting herbs, fruits, and other resources needed for the clan's

2307.name: Plateau's Edge
2307.description: You stand at the edge of the plateau, a thin layer of snow coating the ground beneath your feet. To the east, the orc-made wall of the settlement gives way to the natural wall of the plateau as it curves and narrows, with the path snaking along its edge. The sound of a distant eagle's cry echoes across the mountains, and the vast shadow of the Three Shadow mountains stretches before you, dark against the cold sky.

2308.name: Snowy Path
2308.description: The path follows along the edge of the plateau, winding around outcroppings of rock and gnarled alpine trees. The towering cliff to the west casts a long shadow over the settlement, and to the east the valley sprawls out before you in a breathtaking vista of snow and ice.

npcs.name: Skarag gatherer
npcs.description: Her strong hands and agile fingers are a testament to her expertise in collecting herbs, fruits, and other resources needed for the clan's

2309.name: End of the Road
2309.description: You find yourself at a simple wooden gate that opens into a wide enclosure on the eastern side of the plateau. To the west, the road stretches through edge of the plateau, occasionally disappearing into drifts of snow. The gate itself is flanked by tall posts of spruce, and beyond it, you can hear the sounds of animals grazing and stirring.

npcs.name: Skarag mountain kid
npcs.description: young goat's energetic movements and curious nature reveal its inexperience

2310.name: Animal Pen: East
2310.description: The ground here is covered in a layer of straw and hay, and the smell of animals is strong. A low granite wall marks the edge of the plateau as it ends to the east and south. In the northern cliff face is a small cave providing shelter from the weather.

npcs.name: Skarag mountain kid
npcs.description: young goat's energetic movements and curious nature reveal its inexperience

2312.name: Eastern Thoroughfare
2312.description: The low houses of the settlement gradually give way to a sheer cliff face rising to the north. The road here is wide and well-trodden, with a few scattered tracks leading off to the side. The cliff itself is unremarkable, save for a dark opening that seems to lead into the very heart of the mountain. The sound of rushing water echoes from within, and a faint glow emanates from deep inside. Skulrik the Goatherd moves north.

npcs.name: Mountain hawk-eagle
npcs.description: agile build. Its keen eyes and swift wings enable it to excel at reconnaissance. Its plumage is a mix of dark brown and white, with a

npcs.name: Skarag gatherer
npcs.description: Her strong hands and agile fingers are a testament to her expertise in collecting herbs, fruits, and other resources needed for the clan's

npcs.name: Skarag hunter
npcs.description: tracking and hunting prey in the harsh mountain terrain.

npcs.name: Skarag mountain kid
npcs.description: young goat's energetic movements and curious nature reveal its inexperience

npcs.name: Skarag shaman
npcs.description: His eyes do not quite focus on you.  His skin is marked with tattoos

npcs.name: Skarag hunter
npcs.description: tracking and hunting prey in the harsh mountain terrain.

npcs.name: Skarag mountain ewe
npcs.description: Her thick, fluffy coat is matted at the chest from harder weather earlier

2314.name: Tavern
2314.description: You stand inside a low, long building made of strong fir and spruce wood and granite. The air inside is thick with the scent of burning pine logs and roasting meat, and the sound of crackling fire fills your ears. A large central fire pit dominates the room, with a ring of furs and hides laid out around it for seating. Various weapons, tools, and hunting trophies are mounted on the walls, and piles of thick furs are stacked in the corners. The ceiling is low, with rough-hewn wooden beams supporting it, and sturdy barrels are stacked around the room. A Skarag hunter shoots an arrow deeply into Neptune's head. Neptune steps intrepidly toward her foe and thrusts cruelly at a Skarag hunter.

2315.name: Plateau Plaza
2315.description: The open plaza is nestled at the base of a massive cliff face, rising up into the snowy mountain peaks above. The structures surrounding the plaza are made of rough-hewn granite and fragrant fir and spruce logs, their steeply- pitched roofs designed to shed the heavy snowfall. The plaza itself is of flat, smooth stone, with occasional grooves worn into the surface from the passage of sleds and carts. The sounds of the mountain winds can be heard faintly in the distance, and the smell of pine and woodsmoke permeates the area.

npcs.name: Skarag shaman
npcs.description: His eyes do not quite focus on you.  His skin is marked with tattoos

2316.name: Staircase up the Mountain
2316.description: The carved staircase inclines steeply, twisting and turning as it climbs the cliff face. Cold mountain air whips past you, carrying the sharp scent of pine and snow. Jagged rocks jut out from the cliff's surface, making each step treacherous.

2317.name: Outside a Wooden Outpost
2317.description: Suddenly, the stairs give way to a small rocky ledge, which juts out from the face of the mountain. Here, perched precariously on the edge, stands a wooden outpost. The structure is made of sturdy timber logs, lashed together with thick rope, and reinforced with boulders from the mountain itself. From this vantage point, you can see the trail of the staircase as it continues to ascend towards the next level of the settlement, while down below you can spot an open plaza. You feel less blessed.

2318.name: Inside the Outpost
2318.description: Upon entering the wooden outpost, you are greeted by a warm and cozy atmosphere. The thick timber walls and the flickering light of a central hearth provide a stark contrast to the frigid mountain air outside. Though modest in size, the interior is well-organized and functional, with weapons and supplies neatly arranged along the walls. A small table accompanied by a few chairs occupies one corner. High, narrow windows on each side of the outpost allow for an impressive view of the surrounding landscape.

2319.name: High on the Mountainside
2319.description: A gust of cold wind blasts you as you step onto the rocky ledge, overlooking the valley below. High above, the rocky outcroppings and jutting spires that compose the cliff face seem to come to an end, with a sheer drop that plunges far into the valley below. Yet from the edge of this precipice, you can see the eyries of the great eagles of the north, their wings dark against the cold mountain sky. The wind carries the faint scent of pine and snow, and you can see the snow-capped peaks of the northern mountains in the distance.

nw.to_room_name: The Top of a Stone Staircase

2320.name: Temple Courtyard
2320.description: The temple courtyard is open to the sky on all four sides, ringed by mountain peaks that rise so high you have to lean back to see their tops. Snow falls slowly into the courtyard regardless of the weather elsewhere on the mountain. Stone slabs along the perimeter walls have been carved with totems and symbols and colored with the soot of generations of fires. The soothing rain washes over Neptune. Neptune looks slightly better.

2321.name: Shaman's Path
2321.description: The stone road is lined with tall, slender evergreens that sway in the mountain breeze, their snow-dusted branches casting dappled shadows on the ground. Carved totems flank the path, each one a depiction of the Skyrazor or another revered spirit. The scent of incense and burning herbs hangs heavy in the air.

npcs.name: Steppe eagle
npcs.description: environment, and its broad wingspan allows it to glide gracefully above the rugged terrain. Its sharp eyes are constantly scanning for small

2322.name: Outside a Large Structure
2322.description: A long, low house looms to the west, its wooden beams dark with age and its granite walls weathered. Carvings of warriors and beasts run the length of the front, hand-cut and well-maintained. Snow-dusted evergreens frame the entrance. The path underfoot connects this hall to the temple courtyard.

2323.name: Chief's Quarters
2323.description: Candlelight throws soft shadows across polished marble and alpine wood. A fur-covered bed sits in one corner, the layers piled deep enough that you cannot see the frame. A heavy wooden desk along the opposite wall is laden with scrolls and maps, its surface etched with runes. Totems and weathered relics hang on the walls between.

2324.name: War Room
2324.description: The southernmost room of the Council Hall is given over to the work of war. An expansive table dominates the center, weighted down with maps. Rugged shelves along the walls hold weapons and armor of mountain make, ready to be issued. A narrow balcony to the south overlooks the settlement and the valley beyond. Warleader Kragar BRUTALLY beats Neptune to the ground with their club! Warleader Kragar spins about and BRUTALLY crushes Neptune. Samu drains Warleader Kragar's life! Samu rolls right and swings at Warleader Kragar's arm. Neptune jumps up! Neptune misses Warleader Kragar.

npcs.name: Warleader Kragar
npcs.description: who expects to have to move.  His arms and chest are dense with the kind of scarring that comes from being good enough to survive but not always good enough to escape unhurt.  He is watching you the way you might watch an

2325.name: Entrance Chamber
2325.description: The cavern walls here are marble, polished smooth by long use, veined with deep blues and greens that change as you walk. Clusters of pale fungi grow in the corners and along the floor, giving off enough light to see by but not enough to read by. The air smells faintly of stone and water.

2326.name: Converging Energies
2326.description: Standing in this part of the cavern raises the hair on your arms. The marble walls show patterns that seem to belong to several different stones at once, the seams between them not visible. The air does not move.

2327.name: The Sacred Alcove
2327.description: The marble of this small alcove forms a natural shelf at waist height that has been used as an altar. Candles burn at intervals along it. Small personal offerings have been placed between them: a knife laid flat, a leather thong strung with teeth, a bowl of dried herbs gone faintly fragrant. The light from the candles is enough to read the symbols carved into the surrounding stone.

npcs.name: High Shaman Rognar
npcs.description: mapped with ritual tattoos that have been added to over many years - the inks of the older ones have faded grey while the newer ones still hold their black.  His braid is grey at the roots and black at the ends.

3641.name: A Sheltered Cavern
3641.description: You enter a cozy cave that obviously is used as a living quarters. The walls of the cave are jagged and rough, with patches of ice clinging to the rocky surface. The floor is covered in thick furs and blankets, and a warm fire crackles merrily in a stone hearth. There are several shelves carved into the walls, filled with supplies and trinkets, and a small wooden table sits in the center of the room, surrounded by low stools.

3642.name: The Animal Pen
3642.description: The space is wide and open, with a rocky cliff face rising to the north and the edge of the plateau stretching away to the east and south. The air is filled with the smell of damp fur, hay and manure, and the ground is rocky with hardy shrubs and sparse alpine trees.

npcs.name: Skarag mountain ewe
npcs.description: Her thick, fluffy coat is matted at the chest from harder weather earlier

3643.name: Animal Pen: South
3643.description: The southern end of the animal pen is a jumble of rocks and scrubby alpine trees. A low stone wall marks the edge of the plateau, and beyond it you can see the valley stretching away into the distance. The sound of rushing water grows louder here, and you can just make out the sight of a small stream cutting through the valley below. To the north is the rocky cliff face that forms the northern edge of the pen.

3644.name: A Snowy Eastern Path
3644.description: Snow crunches underfoot as you stand on a narrow path following the wall along the edge of the plateau eastward. The wall beside you is built from rough-hewn stones, held together with mortar made from the local soil, and the path itself is little more than a packed-down trail of snow and ice.

npcs.name: Skarag hunter
npcs.description: tracking and hunting prey in the harsh mountain terrain.

3646.name: A Cavern Blacksmith
3646.description: The sound of dripping water echoes through this cavern, providing a steady rhythm to the clang of hammer on anvil. The blacksmith's forge is built into the back wall of the cave, with glowing embers casting flickering shadows across the rough-hewn stone. The air is thick with the scent of hot metal and burning wood, and the sound of the blacksmith's work rings through the chamber. A small stream winds its way through the cavern, providing a natural source of cool water for quenching the forge's hot metal.

npcs.name: Kharzog the Blacksmith
npcs.description: Kharzog the Blacksmith is a classless curiosity. It appears to be a Skarag Orc. You will receive normal XP for killing it. Kharzog is short and broad, with arms thick from a life of metalwork. His skin is dark with soot and sweat.  He doesn't pause his hammering when you enter the forge - he works to the rhythm, not to your schedule.

npcs.name: Mountain hawk-eagle
npcs.description: agile build. Its keen eyes and swift wings enable it to excel at reconnaissance. Its plumage is a mix of dark brown and white, with a

npcs.name: Steppe eagle
npcs.description: environment, and its broad wingspan allows it to glide gracefully above the rugged terrain. Its sharp eyes are constantly scanning for small

3647.name: A Cleared Path
3647.description: A winding path leads westward from the main plaza, cutting through the snowy terrain. The narrow track is mostly clear, with only a few patches of snow remaining at the edges. The surrounding alpine trees loom overhead, casting long shadows across the ground.

3648.name: A Mountain Staircase
3648.description: The staircase is carved haphazardly into the cliff face, rising abruptly and disappearing into the jagged peaks above. Each step is a reminder of the unforgiving landscape that surrounds you, and the steep incline is unrelenting no matter which way you move. At this height, you are afforded a glimpse of the sheer scale and power of the mountains that loom over you, a breathtaking view that could make you feel both insignificant and empowered at the same time.

3649.name: The Top of a Stone Staircase
3649.description: A stone staircase ends at this snowy mountain summit. The crisp mountain air fills your lungs, and the sound of the wind whistling through the peaks surrounds you. Snow-capped mountains stretch as far as the eye can see in all directions, and the landscape is dotted with evergreens and the occasional boulder. The only path from here leads north, winding its way towards low, longhouses.

s.to_room_name: The Top of a Stone Staircase

3651.name: Shaman's Dwelling
3651.description: The shaman's home is dim and warm. Candles burn at intervals along the walls, the light catching on shelves cluttered with bound herbs, carved bones, and stoppered jars whose contents you do not want to identify. A central hearth crackles low, and the air smells of sage and woodsmoke. The earthen floor is covered in furs and woven rugs that absorb the cold from below.

3652.name: A Cluster of Homes
3652.description: The stone path ends at a cluster of dwellings nestled along the edge of the mountain. The homes are built from stone and wood, their snow-dusted roofs and sturdy walls standing firm against the biting winds. A sheer drop along the eastern edge looks out over the valley below, the forest canopy stretching dark and unbroken to the horizon.

3653.name: A Totem Carver's Home
3653.description: The room is warm and smells of pine. Aged wood and granite blocks form the walls, fitted close together. Carved totems stand against the walls and lean in corners, in various states of completion - some still rough-cut from the log, some far enough along that the eyes of the beasts on them are looking back. Wood shavings and stone dust litter the earthen floor near a small workbench.

npcs.name: Yrthak the Totem Carver
npcs.description: someone who has spent his life cutting wood and stone.  He is currently working on a totem of a snow-leopard, and he glances up only briefly when
